## Summary

Describe the bounded change and its safety impact.

## Validation

- [ ] Focused tests passed
- [ ] Full project tests passed
- [ ] Repository safety validation passed
- [ ] No private scope, target, secret, or evidence was committed

## Provenance and licensing

- [ ] All work is original, or every external influence has a provenance record
- [ ] New dependencies and tools are recorded in the dependency license inventory
- [ ] Copied, adapted, generated, or clean-room material is identified explicitly
- [ ] Upstream source, immutable version, copyright, and license are recorded
- [ ] Required notices and redistribution obligations are recorded
- [ ] Provenance decision is `accepted`; any other status blocks merge
